summary: Trump’s two-week ceasefire announcement boosted Nifty and global markets, with strong gains across banking, auto, and energy sectors. Technical indicators signal continued bullish momentum, while investors remain cautious of geopolitical risks.

title: Pakistan stocks see biggest-ever surge after US-Iran ceasefire, KSE 100 jumps 12,000 points
